'''tanama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dochmius|dochmius]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-n-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dochmius|dochmius]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tanama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tænæmæth|tænæmæth]] || [[word:tænæmæj|tænæmæj]] || [[word:tænæmæsh|tænæmæsh]] || [[word:tænæmæ|tænæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tananamath|tananamath]] || [[word:tananamaj|tananamaj]] || [[word:tananamash|tananamash]] || [[word:tananama|tananama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tanamath|tanamath]] || [[word:tanamaj|tanamaj]] || [[word:tanamash|tanamash]] || [[word:tanama|tanama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tanafmath|tanafmath]] || [[word:tanafmaj|tanafmaj]] || [[word:tanafmash|tanafmash]] || [[word:tanafmaf|tanafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tanamatha|tanamatha]] || [[word:tanamaja|tanamaja]] || [[word:tanamasha|tanamasha]] || [[word:tanamaka|tanamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tanamath|tanamath]] || [[word:tanamaj|tanamaj]] || [[word:tanamash|tanamash]] || [[word:tanama|tanama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tanamathal|tanamathal]] || [[word:tanamajal|tanamajal]] || [[word:tanamashal|tanamashal]] || [[word:tanamakal|tanamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tanamathatha|tanamathatha]] || [[word:tanamajaja|tanamajaja]] || [[word:tanamashasha|tanamashasha]] || [[word:tanamaka|tanamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tanamathan|tanamathan]] || [[word:tanamajan|tanamajan]] || [[word:tanamashan|tanamashan]] || [[word:tanamakan|tanamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tanamathaoro|tanamathaoro]] || [[word:tanamajaoro|tanamajaoro]] || [[word:tanamashaoro|tanamashaoro]] || [[word:tanamakaoro|tanamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
